title: Top 10 Client by Revenue — EXL L&A Accounts (2025)
grain: one row per top-10 EXL L&A account, with 2025 revenue
summary: Ranked list of EXL's top 10 Life & Annuity accounts by 2025 revenue, with the revenue amount in USD. The single authoritative source in this workbook for L&A account revenue and ranking.
use_cases: Who are EXL's largest L&A clients by revenue?
What is 2025 revenue for a specific top L&A account?
Rank / total revenue across the top L&A accounts
Is a given client in EXL's top 10 L&A accounts?

columns.name: Top 10 Accounts
columns.note: account name; note some use full legal names (e.g. 'Prudential Insurance') that may differ from short names elsewhere in the workbook

columns.name: Revenue 2025
columns.note: 2025 revenue in USD, stored as formatted currency text

not_answerable.q: Revenue for clients outside the top 10
not_answerable.reason: only the top 10 accounts are listed

not_answerable.q: Revenue by line of business or process
not_answerable.reason: revenue is given only at total account level
only a single 2025 figure per account
